name: WLF_CERTIFICATES
description: Table to store the details of Certificates

columns.Name: CERTIFICATE_ID
columns.Comments: This column will be used to save the unique Certificate Id

columns.Name: CERTIFICATE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the Certificate Type

columns.Name: CERTIFICATE_FILE_NAME
columns.Comments: This column is used to store Certificate File Name

columns.Name: CERTIFICATE_REF_TYPE
columns.Comments: Column to store Certificate Reference Type

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_ID
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the learningItemId in case of certificate ref type value is overridden to ORA_SPECIFIC

columns.Name: LEARNING_ITEM_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column is used to store the Learning Item Type

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
